metadata.description: rmsdu's portable Claude Code stack: memory, workflow framework, UI/UX design, video, and marketing skills

plugins.name: my-stack
plugins.description: Installs the whole stack in one command: claude-mem, superpowers, ui-ux-pro-max, marketing-skills, remotion-skills

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Persistent memory system for Claude Code - context compression across sessions

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, brainstorming, collaboration patterns

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: UI/UX design intelligence: styles, palettes, font pairings, charts, stack guidelines

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 47 marketing skills by Corey Haines: copywriting, CRO, SEO, ads, email, pricing

plugins.name: remotion-skills
plugins.description: Remotion video creation skills: markup, captions, rendering, SaaS, interactivity
